title: The People Push Back
description: Dressrosa’s citizens and allies resist the Birdcage together as the final countdown begins.
scene: On pages 4–8, Doflamingo, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Colosseum Fighters, Luffy move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Three minutes before bird cage reaches the central district

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The fateful moment at which all will be decided draws near!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Its contraction speed is in- creasing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This bastard's really got it in for us!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: This country's gonna be carved up like a Christ- Mas turkey before Lucy manages to recover!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've got no choice but to try and do something ourselves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Take down Doflamingo and the bird cage along with him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You idiots sure are thick.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is me asking politely. Bring me Straw Hat ...Now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Anybody, however I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gatz- San!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: There's still ...three-and-a- half minutes till Lucy's recovery!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: In that time, we're surely going to suffer countless casualties!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But how can I throw a contender that can't fight into the ring!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Until this boy receivers,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'm not handing him over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: T-! T-T-T-T-T-T-T-! Tra- FALGAR LAW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The Hi- Hichi- Buka-...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: If I didn't know any better, I'd say you were running away from someone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: You really think his Haki's gonna come back!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Well! He told me he needed 10 minutes, which means ...we've got 3 minutes and 20 seconds left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: A fight where every last second counts, eh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Leave him with me... it's been a while since I baby sat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Southeast town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Ready!? Here we go ladies and germs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: My barrier ain't gonna get cut, I promise you that much!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Follow zero- Senpai's lead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Nninggooh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Hyahoho!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Kiling!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: "DANDE- Health"**?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: That's right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: That's what the flowers that bloom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: From Princess Manshelly's tears are called!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Someone save me! The cage is gonna get me!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Kyaa AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Hurry it up! Pick up the pace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I can't, damn it! Why'd I have to sprain my ankle at a time like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Do your best!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: What!? He's hauling ass now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: How the hell did he turn into a sprinter!? What's going on!?

summary: This part focuses on the people push back, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
